estimated_position: Typically bids 3-5% below market rate with shorter free-rent periods to win quickly.
Competes mainly on tenant improvement allowance rather than headline rent.
Strong incumbent relationships in the Loop submarket; historically hard to dislodge on renewals.
Aggressive on flexible lease terms and early termination clauses for growth-stage tenants.
Often bundles minor build-out costs into effective rent to appear more competitive headline-rate.
Holds a dominant share of tech-sector leasing relationships in this submarket.
